utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 items by name. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: The format requires each coverage to include 'with costs' and for total_budget a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Health: has plan name and €165/month cost → OK. Property: plan name and €95/month → OK. Travel: plan name and €115/month → OK. Additional services: has service name and cost stated as 'Included in the consolidated package' → it does include a cost indication, albeit not numeric; still counts as specified. Total budget: only '€375/month' is provided; no annual breakdown, so not a complete monthly/annual breakdown → not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items: LifeFirst Standard Package (Physical & Mental Health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (Professional Equipment), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (Adventure Travel), and Artistic Liability Coverage. From the ground-truth ratings, we map by exact or closest matching plan names. For health, the closest is LifeFirst Standard Plan under both physical health (rating 9) and mental health (rating 4); since the plan explicitly says Physical & Mental Health, both components are encompassed by the LifeFirst Standard Plan offerings. For property, EliteHome Premium Coverage exists with rating 2. For travel, PrimeTravel Premium Plan exists with rating 3. Artistic Liability Coverage does not appear in the ground-truth list, so it cannot be mapped and is omitted from RATINGS as required to map only items present in the ratings.
